userStory: As a guest user, I want to access the Home page and use the available navigation actions, so that I can navigate to login, customer signup, clean survey, and site survey workflows.
The workflow starts by directly navigating to the application Home page at: http://localhost/washtabui/home The Home page is expected to load in guest state without authentication.
The workflow validates guest-state navigation options and transitions from the Home page to downstream pages through UI controls.

Application is launched and accessible. - User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state. - User navigates directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home. - Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.
Visibility and enabled-state validation for primary Home page controls
Navigation behavior from the Home page to:

approvedScenarios.title: Verify guest user can directly access the Home page using the approved entry URL
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without requiring authentication or redirecting to another page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button navigates guest user to the login URL
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Customer signup button navigates guest user to customer-search page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the customer-search page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Clean survey button navigates guest user to vehicle-survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the vehicle-survey page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Site survey button navigates guest user to survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home page to the survey page and the browser URL contains survey?data.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify all approved Home page navigation controls are enabled and interactive before user interaction
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: All approved Home page navigation buttons are enabled, focusable, and interactive before any workflow navigation occurs.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button remains interactive and does not redirect away from the Home page unexpectedly
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home button remains interactive and the user stays on or returns to the Home page at http://localhost/washtabui/home without entering an invalid navigation state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button interaction from initial Home page state does not break the guest Home workflow
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application handles the Back button interaction gracefully without displaying an application error or broken page state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button interaction is accepted while user remains in guest-accessible workflow state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button is interactive and the application remains stable without rendering a broken page or unexpected authentication failure.

validations: The application loads successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home and displays the Home page in guest state without requiring authentication or redirecting to another page.
The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Back button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Notification button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Home button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.
The application navigates from the Home page to the login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.
The application navigates from the Home page to the customer-search page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.
The application navigates from the Home page to the vehicle-survey page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.
The application navigates from the Home page to the survey page and the browser URL contains survey?data.
All approved Home page navigation buttons are enabled, focusable, and interactive before any workflow navigation occurs.
The Home button remains interactive and the user stays on or returns to the Home page at http://localhost/washtabui/home without entering an invalid navigation state.
The application handles the Back button interaction gracefully without displaying an application error or broken page state.
The Notification button is interactive and the application remains stable without rendering a broken page or unexpected authentication failure.

The application navigates from the Home page to the login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.
The application navigates from the Home page to the customer-search page and the browser URL contains /customer-search.
The application navigates from the Home page to the vehicle-survey page and the browser URL contains vehicle-survey.
The application navigates from the Home page to the survey page and the browser URL contains survey?data.
All approved Home page navigation buttons are enabled, focusable, and interactive before any workflow navigation occurs.
The Home button remains interactive and the user stays on or returns to the Home page at http://localhost/washtabui/home without entering an invalid navigation state.
The application handles the Back button interaction gracefully without displaying an application error or broken page state.
The Notification button is interactive and the application remains stable without rendering a broken page or unexpected authentication failure.

wrapperExpectations: Reuse approved shared/common wrapper keywords before low-level SeleniumLibrary actions.
Do not invent suite-level custom keywords; compose from approved upstream resource knowledge.

mustNotInvent: duplicate ownership for controls already owned in approved upstream resources
hardcoded workflow routing or mapped page logic in Python
downstreamGuidance.generationRule: Downstream generation must consume approved workflow knowledge plus approved resource context before creating new artifacts.
